name: heatsync
description: heatsync in chatterino: inline emote rendering, a click-to-insert emote menu (/hsemotes), post + chat-log archive search (/hssearch, /hschat), browse anyone's emotes (/hsinv), >>threadlinks, kick+youtube multichat with go-live status, live inventory sync, and tab-complete from your inventory + 7TV/BTTV/FFZ.
